transcript: Thank you for calling Airport Appliance! How may I help you? Hello?
Go ‘head. Uh, you guys called me, I thought. [laughs]
No. I just got received a call here.
Thank you for calling Airport Appliance. How may I help you?
Mountain Lion Design. This is Carrie. How can I help you?
You know, I have like three calls coming in to one line—
This one is Capitol Refrigeration. Okay! Um, where are you located? What is the ZIP code where you a—where you live?
—Mou—Mountain Lion Design. How can I direct your call? Hello?
How can I direct your call?
Okay, how can I help you?
Um, I just picked up the phone ‘cause it was ringin’ and—and you were there with a couple other people—
—Oh! I know! We keep getting these weird phone calls where three people are on the line and I don’t understand it! It’s so crazy!
—Okay! Well, let’s hang up! I—let’s just hang up, because I don’t—yeah, I didn’t call you and you didn’t call me!
Thank you for calling CHF. This is Angela. Hello? CHF?
Okay, who are you trying to reach? This is CHF.
—Please state your name after the tone and Google Voice will try to connect you. [tone]
I’m not trying to reach anybody. I got a phone call asking if we sold appliances.
[Lauren of Cody’s Appliance Repair enters call]
Good afternoon! Cody’s Appliance Repair. This is Lauren. How may I help you?
[laughs] [delay, pitch-up] So, I just needed help with an appliance.
Okay! Um, what do you need looked at?
Uh, I need a new conductor unit—
Oh, gosh! Are you, um, are you possibly, uh, doing like a multi-line right now? I keep on hearing, like, um, something on the other line.
Please press “1” to continue your call—
Do you mind if I give you a call back?
Well, I’m at a payphone, here. Um.
I can give you the number to the payphone.
Oh! Okay! Gosh! Um, I can see the number that you called from—is that—? I can give you a call—i—it just keeps on saying, um, “Press ‘1’” in my ear, here.
—This is Josh Pell. I’m sorry I missed your call. Just leave a phone number—
—Well, do you have a conductor unit in stock? [delay, pitch-down]—
—and name and I’ll get to ya as soon as I can. Thanks. Bye.
Hello! This is Travis with Idler’s. How can I help?
Yes, hello? How can I help you?
Oh, I was answering my phone—
—This is Idler’s Appliance. I didn’t call anybody! [laughs]—
—We got some kinda interesting connection goin’ on! [laughs]
Okay, yeah, this is All Star Appliance.
Yeah! I just picked up, uh—uh, my phone line here for a customer and it, uh, and it came through as you guys! So I don’t know what happened there! [laughs]
[voicemail greeting of an appliance shop quietly plays]
Anything I can do for ya?
—I wasn’t trying to call out. So you guys have a good one!
Uh, hi. Could I talk to somebody about, uh, gettin’ some help with an appliance?
Well, I need a whole new conductor unit, uh, here, today.
You mean you need a whole new compressor?
—You guys were the People’s Choice, I read, so…
Yeah. What’s the model on it?
Thank you for calling Idler Home! [unclear] I can help you?
Now we got two phones goin’.
Wanna hang up and call back?—
—Thank you for calling [breaks up] Choice. How can we help you?
[breaks up]—llo? People’s Choice. How can we help you?
Hey, there! It’s Bill with G & S Appliance.
[Kathy of Bed Bath & Beyond enters call]
[breaks up] Bed Bath & Beyond in San Luis Obispo. This is Kathy. How may I direct your call?
